title: cnidoscolus jurgensenii
intro: Cnidoscolus jurgensenii, also known as Mexican fireweed or chiltepin, is a plant species belonging to the family Euphorbiaceae, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant contains compounds with medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial agents, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Cnidoscolus jurgensenii include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, improve digestive issues, and support immune function. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in folk medicine as a poultice or topical application for skin conditions.
